scores.correctness_notes: Correctly covers deduplication, pebble_custom_notice event, and ops API. Adds valid check-failed/check-recovered types not in gold standard. However, misses: (1) warning notice type, (2) notices persist to disk and expire after a defined interval, (3) user-id as part of the unique identity tuple (user ID, type, key).
scores.hallucination_notes: Minor inconsistency: uses both `ops.pebble.Notice.CUSTOM` and `ops.pebble.NoticeType.CUSTOM` — the correct constant is on `NoticeType`, not `Notice`. The `event.info.name` for check events and `notice.last_data` attribute are real. check-failed/check-recovered types are real ops types, not hallucinations.
